creator: lippebsd@gmail.com
text:
Hi Sylvio,

Could you please review the your PORTDOCS install way ? I appreciate 
that you use the form found in one of my ports:

http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/devel/premake/Makefile?rev=1.19;content-type=text%2Fx-cvsweb-markup

Any doubts, tell me, thank you!

--
lippe@FreeBSD.org
